title: 11 Herbal Teas For Emphysema
description: Taraxacum officinale teas contains sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, making it easier to breathe for people with emphysema. The sesquiterpene lactones in Taraxacum officinale teas, such as inulin and taraxasterol, also have antioxidant effects, which can help to protect the lungs from damage.
